'''Grubba Desilijic Aarrpo''', also known as '''Grubba the Hutt''', was the nephew of [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba]] of the [[Desilijic/Legends|Desilijic]] [[Kajidic/Legends|clan]]. He was kidnapped by the [[Whiphid/Legends|Whiphid]] "[[Black Tongue]]" while in transit to [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. However, the Hutt was rescued by [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], who hoped to have the bounty on his head rescinded. Unfortunately, he was captured and imprisoned instead. [[Bounty hunter/Legends|Bounty hunter]] [[Eron Stonefield]] later kidnapped Grubba in an attempt to get the bounty on Solo in a trade-off. However, Solo escaped, and Stonefield and Grubba were captured by [[Dengar/Legends|Dengar]].
